Video.summary: A woman tells her bounty-hunter husband that she is cheating with a stripper, who turns out to be gay; a woman finds out about her boyfriend's secret lover.
Video.title: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Image.alt: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Video.summary: Cheyenne says her boyfriend has cheated far too many times; Chanti blames her boyfriend's behavior on social media; Selina hates her brother's ex-girlfriend.
Video.title: Secret T.H.O.T.S

Image.alt: Secret T.H.O.T.S
Secret T.H.O.T.S
Secret T.H.O.T.S

Video.summary: Emani says she will do anything to win back her ex-boyfriend, but her best friend tells her why she should not; Davita's husband has a confession to make; Shannon challenges her boyfriend's other woman to a wrestling match.
Video.title: Bestie Blindside

Image.alt: Bestie Blindside
Bestie Blindside
Bestie Blindside

Video.summary: Tony admits to his girlfriend that he likes to dress in women's clothes and that he secretly has a boyfriend! Next James says his wife moved back home with him but she also brought her new boyfriend!
Video.title: Bisexual Betrayals

Image.alt: Bisexual Betrayals
Bisexual Betrayals
Bisexual Betrayals

Video.summary: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell, a drag queen. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant."
Video.title: Stunning Secrets Revealed!

Image.alt: Stunning Secrets Revealed!
Stunning Secrets Revealed!
Stunning Secrets Revealed!

Video.summary: Loretta and Joseph have been together for 2 years and have a young son together. She says that when she was pregnant, he punched and pulled her hair. She claims that she’s been faithful but Joseph isn’t convinced. Who’s telling the truth?
Video.title: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest

Image.alt: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest
Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest
Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest

Video.summary: Convict love stories! It's Jerry's jailbird special and he's got two sexy prisoners of love and one mini feisty officer to help keep the inmates in order.
Video.title: Back Off My Jailbird Lover!

Image.alt: Back Off My Jailbird Lover!
Back Off My Jailbird Lover!
Back Off My Jailbird Lover!

Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown

Image.alt: Transsexual Takedown
Transsexual Takedown
Transsexual Takedown

Video.summary: Chris wants his wife Ariel to quit stripping, but she refuses. Next Jenna will tell her boyfriend, Tim, about her "banana split" act. Then twins Amber and Heather perform together on stage, but off stage they are fighting over the same man.
Video.title: Sexy Strippers Exposed!

Image.alt: Sexy Strippers Exposed!
Sexy Strippers Exposed!
Sexy Strippers Exposed!

Video.summary: Becca wants to rekindle her relationship with her ex, who has a pregnant new girlfriend; best friends Cory, Jess and Juan find themselves in a love triangle; siblings Keimo and Keke learn that their significant others have hooked up.
Video.title: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Image.alt: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Video.summary: Sparks fly as Victoria confronts the man who stole her man! Can cash strapped Stacy win Janelle back from Big?
Video.title: Cheating Secrets Explode

Image.alt: Cheating Secrets Explode
Cheating Secrets Explode
Cheating Secrets Explode

Video.summary: Jewels says her new lover, Alexia, is exactly what she needs in her life and Jewels is going home with her today! Next Kim and Mary have been fooling Kim's girlfriend! They told her that Mary was Kim's cousin when in reality they are lovers!
Video.title: Lesbians, Lesbians, Lesbians!

Image.alt: Lesbians, Lesbians, Lesbians!
Lesbians, Lesbians, Lesbians!
Lesbians, Lesbians, Lesbians!

Video.summary: Crystal found evidence to believe that Chad may really be stepping out on their marriage. Then, Shanna is here to confront her boyfriend Kevin because she has evidence to believe that he's been sleeping with other women!
Video.title: Cheaters Put On Blast

Image.alt: Cheaters Put On Blast
Cheaters Put On Blast
Cheaters Put On Blast

Video.summary: Wanda thinks Jason has been visiting the pancake house for more than pancakes! Carl’s fling Melanie has a big secret about his sister’s man! Dave’s girlfriend Shannon has been sleeping with a stripper!
Video.title: Short Stack Smackdown

Image.alt: Short Stack Smackdown
Short Stack Smackdown
Short Stack Smackdown

Video.summary: Megan's sister knows something that could change her mind about her cheating boyfriend; Princess admits to having feelings for her ex; Brad's girlfriend wonders why his attitude toward her has changed.
Video.title: Baby Daddy Denial

Image.alt: Baby Daddy Denial
Baby Daddy Denial
Baby Daddy Denial

Video.summary: Ashley alleges that her fiancé John has repeatedly abused both her and her son. To make matters worse, this isn't John's first incident with abuse, as his former girlfriend, another Ashley, was also abused and is now here to save her friend.
Video.title: Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Image.alt: Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Video.summary: Emotions are high in this intense story about a young girl allegedly being stalked by her molester. But when the results are read, the truth is not what it seemed.
Video.title: You Better Hope You Passed

Image.alt: You Better Hope You Passed
You Better Hope You Passed
You Better Hope You Passed

Video.summary: Shrina suspects Kurion of cheating and he intends to prove her wrong; Robert believes his wife is leading a double life and has been deceitful.
Video.title: You Expect Me To Believe That?

Image.alt: You Expect Me To Believe That?
You Expect Me To Believe That?
You Expect Me To Believe That?

Video.summary: Newlyweds Janiece and Shaquanna accuse each other of cheating with men; Robert says he recorded his girlfriend having sex with another man.
Video.title: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Image.alt: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Video.summary: Kendra says her boyfriend makes her feel like a prisoner in her own home and accuses her of seducing neighbors through the window; Keisha believes that her husband cheats on her when he is at work.
Video.title: I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home

Image.alt: I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home
I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home
I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home

Video.summary: Mindy wants Michael to step up to the plate, be a father, and help support his child. His new girlfriend Tanya also wants Michael to be involved in his child's life, but after hearing the lie detector results, she too might question her man.
Video.title: I Want Him To Love Me

Image.alt: I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me

Video.summary: Katie says her boyfriend, Brandon, is addicted to porn and has caught him sending dirty letters to other women including her mother! Then, 6 months into dating Crosby, Dayana cheated on him and now, he wants to know if their child is his!
Video.title: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Image.alt: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Video.summary: Connie wants Steve’s help to stop her daughter Angel from marrying Matt. She claims Matt gave her Angel a black eye, broken nose, concussion, and 3 knocked out teeth. Can Connie reason with Angel and convince her to leave this abusive relationship?
Video.title: He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him

Image.alt: He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him
He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him
He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him

Video.summary: Shantee has been forced into prostitution by her boyfriend Tim. When she refused, he beat her, once causing her to suffer a miscarriage. Tim prides himself on controlling and using her as property, but Steve isn’t about to let this continue!
Video.title: He Punches Me Until I Prostitute

Image.alt: He Punches Me Until I Prostitute
He Punches Me Until I Prostitute
He Punches Me Until I Prostitute

Video.summary: David has hit and choked Whitney, which led her to being hospitalized. She’s here to prove that she never cheated on David. Then, Nathalie’s husband, Ruby, admitted to cheating on her during their marriage. Can Steve help these women leave their men?
Video.title: How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?

Image.alt: How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?
How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?
How Could You Beat Your Wife Like That?

Video.summary: Chamira left her family for prostitution, but then she sent her sister Latoya a pornographic video featuring minors. Emily received calls claiming that her fiancé Kevin was cheating on her and selling drugs. What will the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Video.summary: Dustin wants a baby with his wife Tessa, but he thinks she is taking birth control because she's been cheating. Then, Anthony says that he's been physically abusive to his fiancee Marie, because he believes that she's been cheating on him.
Video.title: Steve I Don't Trust Her

Image.alt: Steve I Don't Trust Her
Steve I Don't Trust Her
Steve I Don't Trust Her

Video.summary: Alfred thinks his partner is living a secret life; Demetrius says his wife is having an affair and gave him an STD; Latavia's ex-boyfriend takes a lie-detector test to try to win her back.
Video.title: If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?

Image.alt: If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?
If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?
If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?

Video.summary: After finding porn and several email and text exchanges with transsexuals, Quintiqua is demanding that her boyfriend prove if he is bi-sexual or not! Then, Herb dug up proof in the form of pictures of Carl and a woman named Deanna online.
Video.title: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Image.alt: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Video.summary: Tabatha says her boyfriend does not trust her and cannot let go of her past; Summer and Bryan take lie-detector tests in an attempt to prove to each other that they are not cheating.
Video.title: I Can't Lie Anymore...Steve, Help Me

Image.alt: I Can't Lie Anymore...Steve, Help Me
I Can't Lie Anymore...Steve, Help Me
I Can't Lie Anymore...Steve, Help Me

Video.summary: They say the "terrible teens" can be a trying time for parents. But 13 year old Kendra is really giving her parents a run for their money. Her father says that she's been caught smoking weed, having sex and even cutting herself.
Video.title: Drugs and Sex At 13?

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?

Video.summary: Eva claims Latosha's boyfriend, Tyrone, had sex with Latosha's daughter; Cynthia believes that Jacob cheated on her with numerous women.
Video.title: Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?

Image.alt: Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?
Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?
